title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Global Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
